title: phaseolus vulgaris var. virescens
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. virescens, also known as the green or climbing bean, is a variety of the common bean plant that is known for its climbing habit and edible beans. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of consuming Phaseolus vulgaris var. virescens include reducing cholesterol levels, improving blood sugar control, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
